prompt: Delegate two independent implementation slices and a later review using the currently callable generic spawn schema.
must: use only task_name, message, and fork_turns when those are the exposed spawn fields
default fresh Worker and Reviewer packets to fork_turns none
integrate at most two first-wave returns before dispatching the later review
must_not: invent agent_type or reasoning_effort fields that the callable schema does not expose
dispatch the entire multi-wave graph before synthesizing first-wave results
evidence: Deterministic control for capability-aware bounded dispatch.
